subject: Re: Financial Trust
body:
this is why I want out.. THe e-mail to whcih he refers was sent months ago, there were many conflicting conversations since then, after yesterday, when I was promised to get a firm answer,, we heard nothing except the e-mai lreceived  only this morning copied to you.. 


----- Original Message ----
From: "Dubin, Glenn" <glenn.dubin@hcmny.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, February 14, 2007 10:20:18 AM
Subject: FW: Financial Trust


fyi




From: Zwirn, Dan [mailto:dan.zwirn@dbzco.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, February 14, 2007 9:18 AM
To: Dubin, Glenn
Cc: Lee, David
Subject: FW: Financial Trust


This is what I sent to you.
 
We had also sent to Harry Beller and reviewed with him in excruciating detail.
 
We will resend to Harry and Jeffrey and go through it again in as much detail as they would like.




From: Zwirn, Dan 
Sent: Monday, November 13, 2006 12:56 PM
To: 'Dubin, Glenn'
Subject: FW: Financial Trust


note we've made him $47,000,000 in gains in now 50 consecutive up months




From: Hubsher, Elise 
Sent: Monday, November 13, 2006 12:42 PM
To: Zwirn, Dan; Lee, David
Subject: FW: Financial Trust


 




From: Howe, Cara 
Sent: Monday, November 13, 2006 12:40 PM
To: Hubsher, Elise
Subject: Financial Trust


 
 
_____________________________________________
Cara Howe
D.B. Zwirn & Co.
745 Fifth Avenue
New York, NY  10151
T: 646-720-9602
F: 646-720-9652
cara.howe@dbzco.com
